cards.title: Debugging
cards.governance_note: Treat bugs as evidence that reveals a mismatch between expected and observed behavior.

cards.title: Reproducibility
cards.governance_note: Make failures repeatable before changing code, data, configuration, or documentation.

cards.title: Hypothesis Testing
cards.governance_note: Use logs, traces, tests, and reduced cases to test explanations for failures.

cards.title: Regression Testing
cards.governance_note: Turn every meaningful bug into a future check so recurrence becomes visible.
